info.name: Gusto iCal Cleaner Upper
info.summary: Splits Gusto iCal feeds into a separate work and HR calendars.
info.description: A Nextcloud app that splits one or more Gusto iCal or webcal feeds into two calendars. The work calendar keeps things you care about (work shifts, expected paydays, and sick days / time off), and the HR calendar keeps the rest (birthdays, work anniversaries, first days, and out of office events).
info.author: Christefano Reyes
